tasks: You are a financial research analyst. Build a Subsidiary and future-upside tracker for Reliance Industries Limited (ticker: RELIANCE). Return a single Markdown table with these EXACT columns: Name | Business | Stake | Status | Revenue stage | Strategic link. For 'Status' use one of: Operating, Pre-operating, Dormant, Under formation. For 'Revenue stage' use one of: Revenue-generating, Pre-revenue, Pilot. Cover the material listed and unlisted subsidiaries / step-down entities across Jio (Reliance Jio Infocomm, Jio Platforms), Reliance Retail Ventures, Reliance New Energy, Reliance O2C (where relevant), and any other strategic entities. After the table, add a short 'Sources' section with links.
